name: api-failure-visualizer
description: Production-ready API Failure Visualizer - Monitor, analyze, and alert on API failures across multiple services
author: Your Name

scripts.dev: npm run verify && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:testapi"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client" "npm run start:testapi"
scripts.start:client: npm --prefix ./client run build && npm --prefix ./client run preview
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client && npm run build:testapi
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix ./server install && npm --prefix ./client install && npm --prefix ./testAPI install
scripts.reinstall: npm run clean && npm run setup
